title: quercus × neomairei var. numantina
intro: Quercus × neomairei var. numantina is a rare and unique hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between the Quercus robur and Quercus lusitanica species. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high tannin content, which has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating conditions like diarrhea, wounds, and skin infections. Quercus × neomairei var. numantina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
